records.m_Talk_ENG: How was that? Clean work, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How was that? Clean work, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How was that? Clean work, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm hardly one to judge your skills, but
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I'm hardly one to judge your skills, but
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm hardly one to judge your skills, but
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've improved. Much smoother than before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've improved. Much smoother than before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've improved. Much smoother than before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you feel that? The ground just shook.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you feel that? The ground just shook.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you feel that? The ground just shook.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, another swarm? There are so many it's disgusting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, another swarm? There are so many it's disgusting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, another swarm? There are so many it's disgusting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fall back for now. We'll have to abandon the device.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fall back for now. We'll have to abandon the device.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fall back for now. We'll have to abandon the device.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. The little ones are my specialty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. The little ones are my specialty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. The little ones are my specialty.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
No time to pick them off one by one. Gather it all up and blast them in one go
8v!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
No time to pick them off one by one. Gather it all up and blast them in one go
8v!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
No time to pick them off one by one. Gather it all up and blast them in one go
8v!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did a big one pop up right in my face?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did a big one pop up right in my face?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did a big one pop up right in my face?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trust that power too much and you'll end up risking your life for nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trust that power too much and you'll end up risking your life for nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trust that power too much and you'll end up risking your life for nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Way to cash in the foreshadowing so soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Way to cash in the foreshadowing so soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Way to cash in the foreshadowing so soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Amazing
8v it cut through all of them in an instant.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Amazing
8v it cut through all of them in an instant.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Amazing
8v it cut through all of them in an instant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really draw that sword for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really draw that sword for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really draw that sword for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I told you
8v Don't overdo it
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I told you
8v Don't overdo it
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I told you
8v Don't overdo it
8v
